title: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth
display_title: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth
wikitext:
[]: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth?             Quote Post by jaymesspader » Sat Jan 03, 2026 2:25 am Does anyone know if the original theater version of "Death and Rebirth" is available anywhere online? I'm not talking about Death(True)² but the original first version that was only in theaters before it was released in the Japanese Blu-Ray BOX. I'd be really grateful to find it, as I'm curious as to how different it is from the other 2 later releases of it!

[]: Re: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Jan 03, 2026 3:31 pm I can only name physical availables, but they might send you down the right rabbit hole: The original theatrical version is in the JP BD Box (the original or the newly released one), and Death (True), a second of the three versions, was part of the JP Archives of Evangelion DVD release.

Article: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth
[]: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth?             Quote Post by jaymesspader » Sat Jan 03, 2026 2:25 am Does anyone know if the original theater version of "Death and Rebirth" is available anywhere online? I'm not talking about Death(True)² but the original first version that was only in theaters before it was released in the Japanese Blu-Ray BOX. I'd be really grateful to find it, as I'm curious as to how different it is from the other 2 later releases of it!

[]: Re: Where to find the original Death and Rebirth?             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Jan 03, 2026 3:31 pm I can only name physical availables, but they might send you down the right rabbit hole: The original theatrical version is in the JP BD Box (the original or the newly released one), and Death (True), a second of the three versions, was part of the JP Archives of Evangelion DVD release.
